title: melandrium viscosum
intro: Melandrium viscosum, also known as sticky catchfly, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Melandrium viscosum include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as protecting against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Melandrium viscosum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
